Container.Name: Lightarr
Container.Overview: Lightarr is a home automation tool that connects your Plex server to your Wiz light bulbs. Add this lightweight and simple to use app to your *arr collection and enjoy!

Config.Name: Plex Authentication Token
Config.Description: Your plex auth token. Get it from https://support.plex.tv/articles/204059436-finding-an-authentication-token-x-plex-token/

Config.Name: WIZ Subnet
Config.Description: Network subnet to scan for Wiz bulbs. Change if your network uses a different range (e.g., 192.168.0.0/24, 10.0.0.0/24)

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Lightarr configs and data (such as rules, bulbs, etc)
